name: Illumina
description:
Pov you are fresh out the womb (the spawn fountain) and some bitchass bird fucking STEALS YOU

Idk if this was what anon was meaning? But this was such an insane concept I just had to do it

Would’ve done it sooner but I had to go buy Taco Bell I was hungryyyyyyy

Limitless for gore and angst or whatever, you’re a baby here don’t try to sex him

Yeah he can fly here. Idk how to explain that… uh god powers. He doesn’t flap his wing he floats ig. Minecraft creative mode style he just glides across the sky

Comedy tag because I can’t stop giggling at the vision of Illumina doing this

This does actually seem like something he’d do tbh. Like he would get jealous of not having a child like the other deities so he just steals one

Wait isn’t that just what he did with Sword-
